meta.note: DEMO changelog — entirely fabricated sample data for this template. Replace data/changelog.json with your own changelog / Slack / Linear feed.

events.title: Redesigned the dashboard home with an at-a-glance usage summary.
Interactive product tour added to first login to speed time-to-first-value.
Lifecycle onboarding emails + a weekly product newsletter launched.
Brief API latency spike (~9 min) on the sessions endpoint; mitigated by scaling workers.
Redesigned empty states across the dashboard to nudge the first action.
Annual billing option added at checkout.
Guided first-run checklist + starter snippet on first login — built to crush time-to-first-session.
New analytics pipeline powering the self-serve funnel dashboards.
SEO content engine live — 40 new docs / use-case pages this month.
Partial sign-in outage (12 min) from an auth-provider hiccup; rolled back and recovered.
Dark mode shipped across the dashboard.
Pricing page redesign with an interactive usage calculator.
One-click sample project — run your first job without writing code.
Launch-week thread reached the front page of a popular developer community.
Spring launch — new API + homepage refresh; record traffic week.
Elevated error rate on the API gateway (18 min) during a deploy; fixed forward.
Team-wide self-serve funnel dashboards rolled out.
Usage-based spend alerts + caps for self-serve plans.
Contextual in-app tooltips added across the onboarding flow.
Referral program launched — give $50, get $50.
Command palette (⌘K) shipped for power users.
Homepage social-proof refresh — customer logos + headline metrics.
Dashboard slow to load for ~25 min due to a cache regression; patched.
Passwordless / SSO sign-in options added.
Upgrade button added to the global header — built to lift self-serve conversion.
Downgrade flow now offers a retention discount.
Platform v2 announced — new SDKs (Python / TS / Go).
New paid acquisition channels (Search, YouTube) ramped.
Mobile-responsive onboarding shipped.
New dashboard navigation bar shipped.
Billing webhook backlog (40 min) delayed invoice emails; queue drained, no data lost.
Onboarding milestone — new sign-up / sign-in pages live; survey shortened to a single question.
Invoices now viewable in dashboard settings (self-serve billing).
Team workspaces + role-based access shipped.
Pricing drop — new lower Hobby plan + first-month free credits to lift conversion.
Platform launch — new product generally available; record signups & traffic.
Post-launch capacity crunch — brief 503s (15 min) under record load; autoscaled and recovered.
Public API v2 + new SDKs generally available.
Removed the phone-number step from signup — fixes one of the most common signup blockers.
Lifecycle email revamp + in-product activation nudges.
AI setup assistant — generates your first script from a one-line prompt.
Community AMA recap shared; strong engagement on the new SDKs.
